ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature recorded in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "rain" INTEGER /* Rainfall in mm */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in meters */,
  "cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air quality index */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, satellite, manual input) */,
  "data_validity" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data is valid (0 for invalid, 1 for valid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Geographical location of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, pressure) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Data format used by the sensor */,
  "measurement_scale" TEXT /* Measurement scale used by the sensor (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation above sea level in meters */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country name */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of weather alert (e.g., extreme temperature, heavy rain) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was issued */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the alert in minutes */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, meteorologist, admin) */,
  "organization" INTEGER /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, locked, disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_organization FOREIGN KEY ("organization") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality metric was evaluated */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the quality metric (e.g., %, m/s) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the quality metric (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "metric_status" TEXT /* Status of the quality metric (e.g., acceptable, unacceptable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the organization */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the organization details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "technician" TEXT /* Technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
